reviews.name: w****
reviews.content:
저번에 카카오선물하기로 구입하고 가방에서 떨어져서 없어지구 바잇미에서 다시 구입했어요
이번엔 안없어지길ㅠㅠㅠ 러블키우는 집사로써 항상 같이다니는 기분들고 너무 예쁩니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it before through KakaoGiftCard and lost it when it fell out of my bag, so I repurchased it from BITE ME. Hoping I don't lose this one ㅠㅠㅠ As a cat parent with Ruvv, I feel like I'm always carrying a piece of them with me, and it's so cute!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
저희 고냥이가 낚시대로 노는 거 좋아해서 고리에 걸어서 사냥놀이를 해줬더니 환장합니다ㅋㅋ
허공에 뒷발 팡팡하는 건 또 처음이네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
카메라만 꺼내면 관심 없는 척 해서 찍기 힘들었습니다..
평소에 새로 장난감 사줘도 10분이면 질리는데 20분 넘게도 잘 놀았는데 제가 나가야해서 더 못 하줬네요ㅠ
그냥 검정색이 귀여워서 샀는데 한번 놀고 회색이 됐네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
다양한 다자인이 나오면 좋겠어요ㅠ
월급받으면 두개 더 사러 올게요~
reviews.content_en: Our kitty loves playing with fishing rod toys, so I hung it on a hook and started a hunting game with her and she went absolutely crazy 😂 I've never seen her kick her back legs in the air like that before 😂😂 The moment I pull out the camera she plays it cool so it's hard to film..normally she gets bored of new toys in 10 minutes, but she played with this for over 20 minutes! I had to go out so I couldn't let her play longer ㅠ I bought it just because the black color is cute, but after one play session it turned gray 😂😂😂 I hope they come out with more designs ㅠ I'll come back to buy two more when I get my paycheck~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 첫구매로 할인받아서 샀습니당 ㅎ 귀여워용 바스락 거려서 고양이가 갖고 놀다가 제가 가방에 달고 다녀요 ㅎ 고양이가 고등어라서 회색 구매 했습니다
reviews.content_en: Bought it on my first purchase with a discount ㅎ It's so cute and makes a crinkly sound, so my cat plays with it and I also carry it on my bag ㅎ Since my cat is a mackerel tabby, I got the gray color

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 구매 잘 하였습니다 매우 만족스러운 구매구요 빠른배송 감사드립니다 다시 재구매 하고 싶어집니다
reviews.content_en: Made a great purchase! Very satisfied with it and thank you for the fast shipping ✓ I want to repurchase it again

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 뽀글뽀글 키링 인형이라 진짜 맘에 들어요. 왕귀여움 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's a puffy keychain doll so I really love it. Absolutely adorable ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 정말 짱귀예요 ~ 치즈냥이 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute~ The cheese kitty is super adorable ♡

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 까만 고양이가 넘 깜찍하고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The black kitty is so precious and cute!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아까워서 못쓰겠어요 너무 귀엽ㅜ
reviews.content_en: I can't bring myself to use it, it's too cute ㅜ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 진짜 너어어무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously sooooo cute!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜㅜ 고양이 없는데 사버림 ㅜㅜ..... 사람용임
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅜㅜㅜ I bought it even though I don't have a cat ㅜㅜ..... It's for people!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
첫 구입으로 저렴하게 키링 구입했어요.
우리 냥이들 러시안블루여서 그레이로 구입합니다^^
reviews.content_en: Got a keychain at a good price for my first purchase. Since our kitties are Russian Blues, I got it in gray ^^

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 가방에 달아놓으려고 쿠폰 있어서 교환했네요. 비닐 들어있는지 냥이 얼굴 부분 누르면 바스락 거리네요. 귀엽긴한데 가격에 비해서 상품 질은 별로입니다.
reviews.content_en: I exchanged it with a coupon to hang on my bag. There's plastic inside—when I press the cat's face part, it crinkles. It's cute, but the quality isn't great for the price.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
저희집 고양님과 닮아서 구매하게 되었어요 !
키링으로 쓰지만 바스락 소리가 나니까 엄청 관심가지더라구요. 마음에 들어요 '-'
reviews.content_en: Decided to buy it because it looks like our cat! I use it as a keychain, but it makes a crinkling sound so our kitty shows so much interest in it. I love it '-'

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 만질때마다소리나구 너무 깜찍해요,,♡
reviews.content_en: It makes a sound every time I touch it and it's so adorable,, ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락 바스락 촉감이 좋아요
만지고있으면 저희집 냥이가  뛰어옵니다
reviews.content_en: The crinkling texture feels nice. When I touch it, our kitty comes running over

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 키링이 귀여워요. 차키에 필요해서 구입했어요.
reviews.content_en: The keychain is cute. I bought it because I needed it for my car keys.

reviews.name: 혜****
reviews.content: 가방에 잘 달고다니구잇음 귀여움
reviews.content_en: I carry it well attached to my bag and it's so cute

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 귀여워요~~ 우리 아기들 닮아서 사랑스럽네요^^♡
reviews.content_en: It's adorable~~ It looks just like our babies, so I love it ^^♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리집애랑 똑같이 생겨서 블랙으로 골랐어유
에코백에 데코용으로 딱이네요
reviews.content_en: It looks exactly like our pet so I chose black. It's perfect as a decoration for my eco bag

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
제 가방에 달려고 샀어요. ㅋㅋㅋ 
가방에 무언가 달고 싶었는데 아무리 찾아도 맘에드는게 없더군요. 
그러다 유레카!!!처럼 발견한 바잇미 고양이참 키링~~~ >.<
정말 정말 정말 너무 마음에 들어서 다른 색깔도 더 사려고요 ~~
reviews.content_en: I bought it to attach to my bag. ㅋㅋㅋ I wanted to hang something on my bag but couldn't find anything I liked no matter how much I looked. And then eureka!!! I discovered the BITE ME cat keychain~~~ >.<  I love it so much that I'm planning to buy it in other colors too ~~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
울냥이랑 비슷한 색으로 골랐습니다.
보들보들 촉감이 맘에드네요~ 크기도 키링으로 딱이고 
바스락 덕분에 ㅋㅋ 라이(말티즈)가 키 만질때마다 달려와요 ㅋㅋ
색갈별로 사고팟는데!! 기회되면 !! 색별로~구매할래요!
reviews.content_en: I picked it in a color similar to my cat's! 😊 I love the soft, fluffy texture~ The size is perfect for a keychain, and thanks to the crinkly sound, Lai (my Maltese) comes running every time I touch the key lol It's so cute that I bought different colors and I want to collect them all by color if I get the chance!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 작은인형만 좋아해서 안좋아할줄은 알고 있었지만 귀여워서 구매했어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I knew my cat wouldn't like anything but small toys, but it was so cute I had to get it haha

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 고앵이는 없지만 키링으로 쓰려고 구매했는데 진짜,,,,소중하구,,,,,귀엽네요,,,ㅠㅠ,,ㅠㅠ,ㅠㅠ,,,복실복실하고 키링겸 장난감이라 얼굴쪽 만지면 바스락거려요
reviews.content_en: I don't have a cat, but I bought it to use as a keychain and honestly,,,, it's so precious,,,, and cute,,,, 😭😭😭 It's so fluffy and since it's a keychain and toy, it makes a crinkly sound when you touch the face

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content: 혹시 넘맘에들어해서 뺏길까봐 냥이한테는 안보여줫지만.. 사람에게도 넘이쁜 뿌시럭키링인것..!
reviews.content_en: I like it so much that I was worried my cat would try to steal it, so I didn't show it to her.. but it's such a pretty crinkly keychain for people too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 가방에 달았는데 귀여워요.. 안에 비닐로 채워져있는지 누르면 부스럭 소리나요
reviews.content_en: I attached it to my bag and it's so cute.. it has vinyl stuffing inside so it makes a rustling sound when you press it

reviews.name: 누****
reviews.content:
키링으로 쓰려고 주문했어요 
너무 귀엽네요 애들도 관심이 많네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered it to use as a keychain and it's so adorable! The kids are really interested in it too hehe

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 집사는 아닌데... 가방에 잘 달고 다니고 있어요 너무 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: I'm not a cat owner, but I'm carrying it on my bag and it's just so cute

reviews.name: 혠****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워서 샀어요! ㅎㅎ 바잇미 자체 제품들 최고에요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's incredibly cute! hehe BITE ME products are the best

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 우리 코코 닮아서 샀어요^^ 하얀색이랑 같이 샀네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I got it because it looks like our Coco^^ I also got the white one hehe

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content:
삼센치정도작고
던지고놀기에좋더라구요
귀여워요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's about three centimeters so small and it's great for throwing and playing with. It's so cute hehe

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 저희집 고양이 닮아서 샀어요 넘 귀여워용ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looks like my cat at home. It's so cute ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 귀엽네요 더 다양한 얼굴도 나오면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: It's adorable! I'd love to see more variety in the face designs.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
귀여운 키링이예요
퀄리티 적당합니다
reviews.content_en: It's a cute keychain. The quality is decent.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 바스락소리가 나서 귀여워요.
reviews.content_en: I love the crinkly sound it makes. So cute!

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content: 완전 귀여워요.. 잇 아이템
reviews.content_en: It's absolutely adorable.. a must-have item

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
귀엽네요 ㅎㅎㅎ
잘쓰겠습니당
reviews.content_en: It's so cute hehe. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요!! ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute!! ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content: 너무너무 기여워요..
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute..

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 고양이 인테리어 소품으로 구매한건데.. 너무 귀여워서 맨날 제가 들고다녀욬
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a cat decoration piece for my home.. but it's so adorable that I end up carrying it around with me all the time

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 적당한 크기와 바스락 소리가 좋네요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! I love the perfect size and the crinkly sound it makes.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 장난감말고 제 키링으로 달고 다니는중 ㅎㅎㅎ  사길 잘함
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 😄 I'm not using it as a toy—I'm carrying it around as my keychain instead haha. I'm glad I bought it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 귀여운 장난감 100원에 잘받았어요
reviews.content_en: Cute toy, got it for just 100 won. Very happy!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여육 가방에 달고 다닐꺽요
reviews.content_en: So adorable! I'm going to attach it to my bag and carry it around with me

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 인형이 너무너무 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: The plushie is super duper cute!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 이거는.. 넘 귀여워서  집사용 ^^
reviews.content_en: This is... so cute that I'm keeping it for myself ^^ (not for my pet!)

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엾고 예뻐요 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and pretty! Thank you so much

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 생각보다 너무 보슬보슬해서 귀여워요! 저희 집 강아지가 탐냈지만 나도 탐나서 몰래 꽁꽁 숨김..
reviews.content_en: It's fluffier than I expected and that makes it even cuter! My dog at home wanted it, but I loved it so much that I secretly hid it away... 😅

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 집 하루랑 닮았어요 기여워요 ^^
reviews.content_en: It looks just like our dog Haru! It's so cute ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집 호두랑 닮았어요 ^^ 기여워요
reviews.content_en: It looks just like our cat Walnut! So cute ^^

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 저희고양이랑 닮아서 샀어요
reviews.content_en: It looks like our cat so I bought it!
